name: StoryWeaver AI
description: An AI creative writing partner that helps authors, game masters, and content creators overcome writer's block. Generate character backstories, plot twists, fantasy dialogues, and immersive world-building lore in multiple languages and genres (fantasy, sci-fi, horror). Integrates with Google Docs and Scrivener via API

tools.name: character_generation
tools.description: Generate detailed character backstories and personalities

tools.name: plot_twist
tools.description: Create unexpected plot twists and narrative turns

tools.name: world_building
tools.description: Develop immersive lore, settings, and magic systems

tools.name: dialogue_writing
tools.description: Generate authentic character dialogues based on personality and context

prompts.name: story_outline
prompts.description: Generate a complete story outline based on genre, tone, and length

prompts.name: character_arc
prompts.description: Develop a character's growth arc from beginning to end

prompts.name: scene_description
prompts.description: Generate vivid scene descriptions for locations and atmospheres

resources.name: Writing Prompts Database
resources.description: Collection of creative writing prompts for inspiration
